trustedstays.title: TrustedStays at a glance
trustedstays.lead: TrustedStays® offers accredited, professionally managed accommodation across the UK — popular for corporate and longer stays.

points.2: Accredited stays with a focus on standards and safety
points.3: Suitable for short and extended stays (from a few nights to several months)

trustedstays.scope: Enquiries or direct bookings, payment, and confirmation are completed on TrustedStays.

support.title: Local AJSEE support
support.text: Not sure about the steps or ran into a problem? Message us — we’ll guide you through an enquiry or booking in your language.
support.textMobile: Need help with an enquiry or booking? Message us — we’ll help in your language.

1.title: Open the listings
1.text: Click the button to open TrustedStays (opens in a new tab).

2.title: Pick destination & dates
2.text: Search UK stays by city, dates, and number of guests.

3.title: Enquire or book direct
3.text: Enquire or book direct — payment and confirmation happen directly through TrustedStays.

q1.a: No — you’ll enquire or book direct on TrustedStays.

q2.q: Why do I leave AJSEE to book?
q2.a: We use a referral link to TrustedStays® to track referrals. It doesn’t change your price.

q3.q: Can you help if I get stuck?
q3.a: Yes. Message us and we’ll help you in your language.

q4.q: Who handles cancellations or booking changes?
q4.a: Cancellations and changes are handled by TrustedStays® under their terms and conditions. If you’d like, AJSEE can help you navigate the process and communication.

accommodation.disclaimer: AJSEE is not the accommodation provider or payment processor. Booking terms are set by TrustedStays®.

final.title: Ready? Choose your UK stay.
final.text: TrustedStays opens in a new tab — you’ll enquire or book direct with our partner.
